title: Neuroplastic Enlightenment
definition: The transformation of the brain through consistent practice of the Eightfold Path leading to the realization of Nibbāna.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Learning and practicing the Eightfold Path can change your brain and lead to a state of enlightenment called Nibbāna.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Neuroplasticity allows for changes in the structure and function of the brain, which can be harnessed through consistent practice of the Eightfold Path to attain Nibbāna.
difficulty_levels.expert: The Buddha discovered a human firmware update that uses neuroplasticity to change the brain's structure and function, leading to the dissolution of the self and realization of Nibbāna.

extra_fields.insight: Neuroplasticity in action leads to enlightenment through consistent practice of the Eightfold Path.
